<!-- @header -->
<!-- @title value="Fence Proposal" -->
<!-- @from name="A B" email="a@b.com" -->
<!-- /@header -->

## 1. Documenting markers

A stats block is written like this:

```markdown
<!-- @stats -->
<!-- @stat value="$1M" label="Example" source="docs" -->
<!-- /@stats -->
```

And a real stats row that renders:

<!-- @stats -->
<!-- @stat value="42" label="Real" source="here" -->
<!-- /@stats -->
